headline: UBS Raises its Price Target on UniFirst Corporation (UNF) to $260 from $206
summary: UniFirst Corporation (NYSE:UNF) is one of the 10 Best Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates. On April 2, 2026, UBS analyst Joshua Chan raised the price target on UniFirst Corporation (NYSE:UNF) to $260 from $206 and maintained a Neutral rating, describing the company’s latest quarter as “solid” with results coming in slightly ahead of expectations.
